records.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff...* *Huff...*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff...* *Huff...*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff...* *Huff...*

records.m_Talk_ENG: It seems the last Corruption disaster helped you grasp the essence of starlight, even if only slightly.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It seems the last Corruption disaster helped you grasp the essence of starlight, even if only slightly.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It seems the last Corruption disaster helped you grasp the essence of starlight, even if only slightly.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But your movements are unnatural. It's as if you're imitating someone else.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But your movements are unnatural. It's as if you're imitating someone else.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But your movements are unnatural. It's as if you're imitating someone else.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is that really what you're going to say right now?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is that really what you're going to say right now?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is that really what you're going to say right now?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are you doing, madam?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are you doing, madam?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are you doing, madam?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Didn't I say the battle continues until only one person remains?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Didn't I say the battle continues until only one person remains?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Didn't I say the battle continues until only one person remains?

records.m_Talk_ENG: As the heir of a noble house, I can't just sit back and watch my knights disgrace themselves.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As the heir of a noble house, I can't just sit back and watch my knights disgrace themselves.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As the heir of a noble house, I can't just sit back and watch my knights disgrace themselves.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even after my blessing destabilized, my body lagged behind, not my judgment.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even after my blessing destabilized, my body lagged behind, not my judgment.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even after my blessing destabilized, my body lagged behind, not my judgment.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But all I can do is track her sword with my eyes?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But all I can do is track her sword with my eyes?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But all I can do is track her sword with my eyes?

records.m_Talk_ENG: He may have surpassed me, but I was the one who taught Allen how to wield a sword.
records.m_Talk_DEU: He may have surpassed me, but I was the one who taught Allen how to wield a sword.
records.m_Talk_FRA: He may have surpassed me, but I was the one who taught Allen how to wield a sword.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Losing to such a limp excuse for swordsmanship would be embarrassing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Losing to such a limp excuse for swordsmanship would be embarrassing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Losing to such a limp excuse for swordsmanship would be embarrassing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: L-limp?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: L-limp?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: L-limp?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: She read... every move of my blade?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: She read... every move of my blade?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: She read... every move of my blade?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The starlight channeled through an Armament reflects the inner image of its wielder.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The starlight channeled through an Armament reflects the inner image of its wielder.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The starlight channeled through an Armament reflects the inner image of its wielder.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just as swordsmanship begins with unifying mind and body beyond mere repetition of movements.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just as swordsmanship begins with unifying mind and body beyond mere repetition of movements.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just as swordsmanship begins with unifying mind and body beyond mere repetition of movements.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Once you can read the starlight an opponent wields, anticipating their moves becomes simple.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Once you can read the starlight an opponent wields, anticipating their moves becomes simple.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Once you can read the starlight an opponent wields, anticipating their moves becomes simple.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now then, why don't you give it a try?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now then, why don't you give it a try?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now then, why don't you give it a try?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If it were that easy, I wouldn't be struggling like this!
records.m_Talk_DEU: If it were that easy, I wouldn't be struggling like this!
records.m_Talk_FRA: If it were that easy, I wouldn't be struggling like this!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm. If you're lacking the motivation to focus, then allow me to fix that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm. If you're lacking the motivation to focus, then allow me to fix that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm. If you're lacking the motivation to focus, then allow me to fix that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you can break through my defense, I'll answer any one <color=#ffd34c>question</color> you ask.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you can break through my defense, I'll answer any one <color=#ffd34c>question</color> you ask.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you can break through my defense, I'll answer any one <color=#ffd34c>question</color> you ask.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. Even one so sharp it leaves me speechless.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. Even one so sharp it leaves me speechless.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. Even one so sharp it leaves me speechless.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You'll regret that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You'll regret that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You'll regret that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh my. How scary.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh my. How scary.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh my. How scary.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She boasted with confidence, but all she could manage was to follow her opponent's attacks with her eyes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She boasted with confidence, but all she could manage was to follow her opponent's attacks with her eyes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She boasted with confidence, but all she could manage was to follow her opponent's attacks with her eyes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Still, she'd faced stronger opponents many times before.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Still, she'd faced stronger opponents many times before.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Still, she'd faced stronger opponents many times before.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In that case...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: In that case...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: In that case...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Using the fallen knights' swords to wear me down, is it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Using the fallen knights' swords to wear me down, is it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Using the fallen knights' swords to wear me down, is it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's wise not to rush in recklessly, but you still won't be able to reach me this way.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's wise not to rush in recklessly, but you still won't be able to reach me this way.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's wise not to rush in recklessly, but you still won't be able to reach me this way.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tch!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tch!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tch!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well done. That last strike was a decoy to conceal your sword inside your robe, wasn't it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well done. That last strike was a decoy to conceal your sword inside your robe, wasn't it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well done. That last strike was a decoy to conceal your sword inside your robe, wasn't it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: But now that you've exhausted the surrounding weapons, a direct charge is all that's left.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But now that you've exhausted the surrounding weapons, a direct charge is all that's left.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But now that you've exhausted the surrounding weapons, a direct charge is all that's left.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No. It's exactly as planned.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No. It's exactly as planned.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No. It's exactly as planned.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I knew you'd accept my strike head-on.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I knew you'd accept my strike head-on.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I knew you'd accept my strike head-on.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You wrapped your robe... around our locked blades?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You wrapped your robe... around our locked blades?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You wrapped your robe... around our locked blades?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You said there would be no bloodshed in the training hall, and I took you at your word.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You said there would be no bloodshed in the training hall, and I took you at your word.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You said there would be no bloodshed in the training hall, and I took you at your word.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Since I'm holding the robe in place, if you try to cut through it, you'll take off my hand too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Since I'm holding the robe in place, if you try to cut through it, you'll take off my hand too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Since I'm holding the robe in place, if you try to cut through it, you'll take off my hand too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then I could simply drop the sword and back away.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then I could simply drop the sword and back away.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then I could simply drop the sword and back away.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There are still plenty of weapons from the others lying around, after all...
records.m_Talk_DEU: There are still plenty of weapons from the others lying around, after all...
records.m_Talk_FRA: There are still plenty of weapons from the others lying around, after all...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Oh dear.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Oh dear.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Oh dear.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You got me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You got me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You got me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You've won the match, yet you still look dissatisfied.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You've won the match, yet you still look dissatisfied.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You've won the match, yet you still look dissatisfied.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't mock me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't mock me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't mock me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're the one who knocked me flat with a punch.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're the one who knocked me flat with a punch.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're the one who knocked me flat with a punch.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You aimed for my solar plexus. I call that self-defense.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You aimed for my solar plexus. I call that self-defense.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You aimed for my solar plexus. I call that self-defense.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You shouldn't bring personal feelings into the training hall, Esther.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You shouldn't bring personal feelings into the training hall, Esther.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You shouldn't bring personal feelings into the training hall, Esther.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Regardless, I won the wager.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Regardless, I won the wager.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Regardless, I won the wager.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I may not have landed a clean hit, but I did break through your guard.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I may not have landed a clean hit, but I did break through your guard.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I may not have landed a clean hit, but I did break through your guard.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course. I will answer any question you ask.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course. I will answer any question you ask.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course. I will answer any question you ask.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So long as it's sharp enough to leave me speechless.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So long as it's sharp enough to leave me speechless.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So long as it's sharp enough to leave me speechless.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait, that wasn't the deal. You're changing the terms.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait, that wasn't the deal. You're changing the terms.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait, that wasn't the deal. You're changing the terms.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whatever do you mean? I clearly said I'd answer a truly sharp question.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whatever do you mean? I clearly said I'd answer a truly sharp question.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whatever do you mean? I clearly said I'd answer a truly sharp question.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if you're caught up in the match, you should still listen properly. Otherwise, someone might think I lied.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if you're caught up in the match, you should still listen properly. Otherwise, someone might think I lied.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if you're caught up in the match, you should still listen properly. Otherwise, someone might think I lied.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, don't look at me like that. Consider this a little penalty for throwing punches in the training hall.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, don't look at me like that. Consider this a little penalty for throwing punches in the training hall.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, don't look at me like that. Consider this a little penalty for throwing punches in the training hall.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your tactic was clever, I'll give you that. But when you use yourself as bait...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your tactic was clever, I'll give you that. But when you use yourself as bait...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your tactic was clever, I'll give you that. But when you use yourself as bait...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're no knight. You're a walking corpse with a death wish.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're no knight. You're a walking corpse with a death wish.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're no knight. You're a walking corpse with a death wish.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Fine. I'll save my question for later.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Fine. I'll save my question for later.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Fine. I'll save my question for later.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh? Are you sure?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh? Are you sure?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh? Are you sure?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're the one dodging the moment, not me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're the one dodging the moment, not me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're the one dodging the moment, not me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whatever your intentions, if you plan to use me, I'll do the same to you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whatever your intentions, if you plan to use me, I'll do the same to you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whatever your intentions, if you plan to use me, I'll do the same to you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: At the very least, cooperating with you is bound to get me some answers.
records.m_Talk_DEU: At the very least, cooperating with you is bound to get me some answers.
records.m_Talk_FRA: At the very least, cooperating with you is bound to get me some answers.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I like that. A mutual partnership, then.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I like that. A mutual partnership, then.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I like that. A mutual partnership, then.

records.m_Talk_ENG: With your support, this expedition is looking more promising than ever.
records.m_Talk_DEU: With your support, this expedition is looking more promising than ever.
records.m_Talk_FRA: With your support, this expedition is looking more promising than ever.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you just say expedition?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you just say expedition?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you just say expedition?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. A crucial mission to fulfill the long-cherished wish of my house and of the Empire itself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. A crucial mission to fulfill the long-cherished wish of my house and of the Empire itself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. A crucial mission to fulfill the long-cherished wish of my house and of the Empire itself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We leave tomorrow. Make sure you're ready.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We leave tomorrow. Make sure you're ready.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We leave tomorrow. Make sure you're ready.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Chief, we searched the woods to the west, but there's still no sign of Esterosa.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Chief, we searched the woods to the west, but there's still no sign of Esterosa.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Chief, we searched the woods to the west, but there's still no sign of Esterosa.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Corruption disaster is over, yet she hasn't returned... I fear the worst.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Corruption disaster is over, yet she hasn't returned... I fear the worst.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Corruption disaster is over, yet she hasn't returned... I fear the worst.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't say that. That girl became a knight through sheer determination, even when everyone called her talentless.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't say that. That girl became a knight through sheer determination, even when everyone called her talentless.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't say that. That girl became a knight through sheer determination, even when everyone called her talentless.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She's not the kind to die so easily.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She's not the kind to die so easily.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She's not the kind to die so easily.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Still... we're struggling to search the Corrupted Area on our own.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Still... we're struggling to search the Corrupted Area on our own.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Still... we're struggling to search the Corrupted Area on our own.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We sent someone to Charade, but it's far. We don't know when help will arrive.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We sent someone to Charade, but it's far. We don't know when help will arrive.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We sent someone to Charade, but it's far. We don't know when help will arrive.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm. I'd like to hear more about that, if you don't mind.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm. I'd like to hear more about that, if you don't mind.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm. I'd like to hear more about that, if you don't mind.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
W-who's there?! That direction's a Corrupted Area! How did you
8g?!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
W-who's there?! That direction's a Corrupted Area! How did you
8g?!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
W-who's there?! That direction's a Corrupted Area! How did you
8g?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The yapping beasts are taken care of. Disgusting things didn't know their place.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The yapping beasts are taken care of. Disgusting things didn't know their place.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The yapping beasts are taken care of. Disgusting things didn't know their place.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Taken care of...? Wait, are you a Counter?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Taken care of...? Wait, are you a Counter?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Taken care of...? Wait, are you a Counter?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then please, I beg you! Someone from our village has gone missing!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then please, I beg you! Someone from our village has gone missing!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then please, I beg you! Someone from our village has gone missing!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Her name is Esterosa. She's a girl in a robe!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Her name is Esterosa. She's a girl in a robe!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Her name is Esterosa. She's a girl in a robe!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Please find her for us...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Please find her for us...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please find her for us...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Esterosa... Yes, Esterosa...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Esterosa... Yes, Esterosa...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Esterosa... Yes, Esterosa...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Perfect.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Perfect.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Perfect.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've been meaning to have a word with her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've been meaning to have a word with her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've been meaning to have a word with her.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Using the fallen knights' swords to wear me down, is it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Using the fallen knights' swords to wear me down, is it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Using the fallen knights' swords to wear me down, is it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's wise not to rush in recklessly, but you still won't be able to reach me this way.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's wise not to rush in recklessly, but you still won't be able to reach me this way.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's wise not to rush in recklessly, but you still won't be able to reach me this way.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Tch!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Tch!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Tch!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well done. That last strike was a decoy to conceal your sword inside your robe, wasn't it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well done. That last strike was a decoy to conceal your sword inside your robe, wasn't it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well done. That last strike was a decoy to conceal your sword inside your robe, wasn't it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: But now that you've exhausted the surrounding weapons, a direct charge is all that's left.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But now that you've exhausted the surrounding weapons, a direct charge is all that's left.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But now that you've exhausted the surrounding weapons, a direct charge is all that's left.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No. It's exactly as planned.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No. It's exactly as planned.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No. It's exactly as planned.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I knew you'd accept my strike head-on.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I knew you'd accept my strike head-on.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I knew you'd accept my strike head-on.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You wrapped your robe... around our locked blades?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You wrapped your robe... around our locked blades?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You wrapped your robe... around our locked blades?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You said there would be no bloodshed in the training hall, and I took you at your word.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You said there would be no bloodshed in the training hall, and I took you at your word.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You said there would be no bloodshed in the training hall, and I took you at your word.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Since I'm holding the robe in place, if you try to cut through it, you'll take off my hand too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Since I'm holding the robe in place, if you try to cut through it, you'll take off my hand too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Since I'm holding the robe in place, if you try to cut through it, you'll take off my hand too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then I could simply drop the sword and back away.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then I could simply drop the sword and back away.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then I could simply drop the sword and back away.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There are still plenty of weapons from the others lying around, after all...
root.m_Talk_DEU: There are still plenty of weapons from the others lying around, after all...
root.m_Talk_FRA: There are still plenty of weapons from the others lying around, after all...

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Oh dear.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Oh dear.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Oh dear.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You got me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You got me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You got me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You've won the match, yet you still look dissatisfied.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You've won the match, yet you still look dissatisfied.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You've won the match, yet you still look dissatisfied.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't mock me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't mock me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't mock me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're the one who knocked me flat with a punch.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're the one who knocked me flat with a punch.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're the one who knocked me flat with a punch.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You aimed for my solar plexus. I call that self-defense.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You aimed for my solar plexus. I call that self-defense.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You aimed for my solar plexus. I call that self-defense.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You shouldn't bring personal feelings into the training hall, Esther.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You shouldn't bring personal feelings into the training hall, Esther.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You shouldn't bring personal feelings into the training hall, Esther.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Regardless, I won the wager.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Regardless, I won the wager.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Regardless, I won the wager.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I may not have landed a clean hit, but I did break through your guard.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I may not have landed a clean hit, but I did break through your guard.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I may not have landed a clean hit, but I did break through your guard.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of course. I will answer any question you ask.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of course. I will answer any question you ask.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course. I will answer any question you ask.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So long as it's sharp enough to leave me speechless.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So long as it's sharp enough to leave me speechless.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So long as it's sharp enough to leave me speechless.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wait, that wasn't the deal. You're changing the terms.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wait, that wasn't the deal. You're changing the terms.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wait, that wasn't the deal. You're changing the terms.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Whatever do you mean? I clearly said I'd answer a truly sharp question.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Whatever do you mean? I clearly said I'd answer a truly sharp question.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Whatever do you mean? I clearly said I'd answer a truly sharp question.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even if you're caught up in the match, you should still listen properly. Otherwise, someone might think I lied.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even if you're caught up in the match, you should still listen properly. Otherwise, someone might think I lied.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even if you're caught up in the match, you should still listen properly. Otherwise, someone might think I lied.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, don't look at me like that. Consider this a little penalty for throwing punches in the training hall.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, don't look at me like that. Consider this a little penalty for throwing punches in the training hall.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, don't look at me like that. Consider this a little penalty for throwing punches in the training hall.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Your tactic was clever, I'll give you that. But when you use yourself as bait...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Your tactic was clever, I'll give you that. But when you use yourself as bait...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Your tactic was clever, I'll give you that. But when you use yourself as bait...

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're no knight. You're a walking corpse with a death wish.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're no knight. You're a walking corpse with a death wish.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're no knight. You're a walking corpse with a death wish.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Fine. I'll save my question for later.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Fine. I'll save my question for later.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Fine. I'll save my question for later.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh? Are you sure?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh? Are you sure?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh? Are you sure?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're the one dodging the moment, not me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're the one dodging the moment, not me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're the one dodging the moment, not me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Whatever your intentions, if you plan to use me, I'll do the same to you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Whatever your intentions, if you plan to use me, I'll do the same to you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Whatever your intentions, if you plan to use me, I'll do the same to you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: At the very least, cooperating with you is bound to get me some answers.
root.m_Talk_DEU: At the very least, cooperating with you is bound to get me some answers.
root.m_Talk_FRA: At the very least, cooperating with you is bound to get me some answers.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I like that. A mutual partnership, then.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I like that. A mutual partnership, then.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I like that. A mutual partnership, then.

root.m_Talk_ENG: With your support, this expedition is looking more promising than ever.
root.m_Talk_DEU: With your support, this expedition is looking more promising than ever.
root.m_Talk_FRA: With your support, this expedition is looking more promising than ever.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Did you just say expedition?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Did you just say expedition?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Did you just say expedition?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. A crucial mission to fulfill the long-cherished wish of my house and of the Empire itself.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. A crucial mission to fulfill the long-cherished wish of my house and of the Empire itself.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. A crucial mission to fulfill the long-cherished wish of my house and of the Empire itself.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We leave tomorrow. Make sure you're ready.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We leave tomorrow. Make sure you're ready.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We leave tomorrow. Make sure you're ready.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Chief, we searched the woods to the west, but there's still no sign of Esterosa.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Chief, we searched the woods to the west, but there's still no sign of Esterosa.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Chief, we searched the woods to the west, but there's still no sign of Esterosa.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Corruption disaster is over, yet she hasn't returned... I fear the worst.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Corruption disaster is over, yet she hasn't returned... I fear the worst.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Corruption disaster is over, yet she hasn't returned... I fear the worst.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't say that. That girl became a knight through sheer determination, even when everyone called her talentless.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't say that. That girl became a knight through sheer determination, even when everyone called her talentless.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't say that. That girl became a knight through sheer determination, even when everyone called her talentless.

root.m_Talk_ENG: She's not the kind to die so easily.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She's not the kind to die so easily.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She's not the kind to die so easily.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Still... we're struggling to search the Corrupted Area on our own.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Still... we're struggling to search the Corrupted Area on our own.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Still... we're struggling to search the Corrupted Area on our own.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We sent someone to Charade, but it's far. We don't know when help will arrive.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We sent someone to Charade, but it's far. We don't know when help will arrive.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We sent someone to Charade, but it's far. We don't know when help will arrive.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm. I'd like to hear more about that, if you don't mind.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm. I'd like to hear more about that, if you don't mind.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm. I'd like to hear more about that, if you don't mind.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
W-who's there?! That direction's a Corrupted Area! How did you
8g?!
root.m_Talk_DEU:
W-who's there?! That direction's a Corrupted Area! How did you
8g?!
root.m_Talk_FRA:
W-who's there?! That direction's a Corrupted Area! How did you
8g?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: The yapping beasts are taken care of. Disgusting things didn't know their place.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The yapping beasts are taken care of. Disgusting things didn't know their place.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The yapping beasts are taken care of. Disgusting things didn't know their place.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Taken care of...? Wait, are you a Counter?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Taken care of...? Wait, are you a Counter?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Taken care of...? Wait, are you a Counter?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then please, I beg you! Someone from our village has gone missing!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then please, I beg you! Someone from our village has gone missing!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then please, I beg you! Someone from our village has gone missing!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Her name is Esterosa. She's a girl in a robe!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Her name is Esterosa. She's a girl in a robe!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Her name is Esterosa. She's a girl in a robe!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Please find her for us...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Please find her for us...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Please find her for us...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Esterosa... Yes, Esterosa...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Esterosa... Yes, Esterosa...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Esterosa... Yes, Esterosa...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Perfect.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Perfect.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Perfect.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I've been meaning to have a word with her.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I've been meaning to have a word with her.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I've been meaning to have a word with her.
